task_completion.description: Create the required epidemiological folders on the Chrome bookmark bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome bookmark bar or Bookmark Manager displays exactly three new folders: 'Global Health', 'Federal & State', and 'Genomic & Academic'.

task_completion.description: Remove personal bookmarks and sort epidemiological bookmarks into the new folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bookmark Manager shows that entertainment/personal sites (e.g., Netflix, Reddit, Steam) have been deleted, and epidemiological sites (e.g., WHO, CDC, JHU) are placed inside the newly created folders.

task_completion.description: Download foundational datasets to the Surveillance_Data directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal shows the files 'linelist_anonymized.csv' and 'case_definitions_2026.pdf' located in the '~/Documents/Surveillance_Data/' directory, or Chrome's download history shows these files successfully downloaded to that path.

task_completion.description: Disable password saving, address autofill, and payment methods in Chrome.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome settings pages for Passwords, Addresses, and Payment methods show their respective main toggle switches turned off (grayed out/disabled).

task_completion.description: Enable the required GPU and rasterization flags for GIS mapping.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'chrome://flags' page shows the flags '#enable-gpu-rasterization' (GPU rasterization) and '#ignore-gpu-blocklist' (Override software rendering list) with their dropdown menus set to 'Enabled' (typically highlighted in blue).

task_completion.description: Set the browser to open ProMED-mail and CDC websites on startup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome 'On startup' settings page shows the 'Open a specific page or set of pages' option selected, with 'promedmail.org' and 'cdc.gov' (or their full HTTPS URLs) listed as the pages to open.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings, bookmarks, and flags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Chrome browser interface being navigated (Settings, Bookmark Manager, Flags pages) rather than terminal commands modifying Chrome's SQLite databases or JSON preference files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the datasets were actually downloaded from the local server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome download bar/history or actual file icons in the file manager (e.g., a PDF icon for the case definitions) indicating real files, rather than the agent using 'touch' or 'echo' in the terminal to create empty dummy files with the target names.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not spoof the results by typing the expected state into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: All visual evidence must come from the genuine Chrome browser UI and system file manager, not from a text editor, notes app, or terminal simply echoing the success criteria.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'Global Health', 'Federal & State', 'Genomic & Academic'. Personal domains to remove: netflix.com, booking.com, steampowered.com, reddit.com, instagram.com. Epi domains to keep/sort: who.int, ecdc.europa.eu, promedmail.org, healthmap.org, gisaid.org, cdc.gov, fda.gov, health.ny.gov, cdph.ca.gov, dshs.texas.gov, nextstrain.org, pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov, coronavirus.jhu.edu, nature.com, thelancet.com. Files to download: 'linelist_anonymized.csv', 'case_definitions_2026.pdf' to '/home/ga/Documents/Surveillance_Data'. Required Chrome flags: 'enable-gpu-rasterization', 'ignore-gpu-blocklist'. Startup URLs: 'promedmail.org', 'cdc.gov'.
